meaning: n.(香烟、面包等的)透明外包装纸
examples: Overwrap protects and extends the shelf life of the chocolates within.
The consumer removes a film overwrap, then takes a tamper-evidence tear strip off the top of the sliding door.
And there's even more good news: the tea bags are biodegradable, the tea overwrap is compostable and the 100% recycled and recyclable cartons were produced using wind energy.
